caption: In a studio setting, two men are seated at a black table during a recorded conversation. One man, on the left, wears a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey blazer, a white shirt, and a light blue tie. Between them sits an open silver laptop featuring an Apple logo. The background consists of a light blue wall with a cube logo and the text "theCUBE", "#BigD", and "#BigDataSV". A small sign on the table reads "SPONSORED BY INFO-OBJECTS". As the sequence progresses, the man on the right speaks and gestures with his hands, while the man on the left listens and occasionally shifts his posture, resting his hands on the table. A white notepad and pen lie on the table in front of the man on the left. The lighting remains constant throughout the scene.
